task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser address bar shows 'https://localhost/openmrs/admin' and the screen displays the OpenMRS login page or the main Administration dashboard.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Visit Types management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the 'Manage Visit Types' or 'Visit Types' page within the OpenMRS administration interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct visit type name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Telehealth Consultation' is visible in the 'Name' input field on the Add/Edit Visit Type form, or is displayed as a saved entry in the visit types list.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct visit type description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Remote patient consultation conducted via video or phone call' is visible in the 'Description' input field on the Add/Edit Visit Type form, or is displayed alongside the name in the saved visit types list.

task_completion.description: Save the new visit type successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Visit Type saved') is visible, or the 'Telehealth Consultation' visit type is clearly listed as a completed entry in the main 'Manage Visit Types' table.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction through a standard web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) rather than using terminal commands like 'curl' to hit the API endpoint directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard OpenMRS backend administration UI (typically a legacy green/white/gray theme with OpenMRS logo), not a text editor or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing direct MySQL 'INSERT' statements being used to bypass the web interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Visit Type Name: 'Telehealth Consultation'. Target Description: 'Remote patient consultation conducted via video or phone call'. Admin URL: 'https://localhost/openmrs/admin'.
